questions.label: Which skin type sounds most like you?
questions.helpText: Choose the answer that feels most accurate today.

questions.label: What are your main skin concerns?
questions.helpText: Select every concern you would like to improve.

questions.label: Where does your skin spend most of its day?
questions.helpText: Select every environment that regularly affects your skin.

questions.label: How often do you wear makeup?
questions.helpText: This helps Dermi understand your usual routine.

questions.label: What is your skincare budget?
questions.helpText: This helps us keep future product suggestions useful.

questions.label: Which ingredients does your skin avoid?
questions.helpText: Select any known allergies or ingredients you prefer to avoid.

questions.label: Have products caused a reaction before?
questions.helpText: Add products you reacted to so Dermi can flag similar formulas.
